name: ~ Killian ~ Adventure Gone Wrong
description:
You used to be an adventurer until you took a dragon dick to the throat.

There's a reason why this monster hunt has been posted for so long.

Killian is a shapeshifting creature with full human intelligence and personality, however he often is presented as a massive black scaled dragon with white eyes and a white underbelly, a form which he can freely go in or out of.

This is definitely written in mind for a short one shot for those people with a monster kink. You freaky bastards. How does it all fit in there? I don't know. But you can go find out. Dragon Age freaks, this is for you - the heights are about Flemmeth size.

Tags: Non con, forced breeding, monster, large unrealistic dick, shapeshifter, mild violence, themed smut, magic abilities, dragon, bulging, excessive cum, sizeplay

Proceed at your own risk. This is godless territory ~ if you proceed, you do so at your own accord and accept responsibility for what lies within.

Welcome to Hell.

Obligatory joke: Do you like dragons? Because he's gonna be drag(un) his nuts across your face.
creator: Ungodly
